subcodes.first_line: Praise befitteth Him Who is the Object of all desire, Who through His blessed, pure and sanctified Word hath caused His servants to be illumined with tender mercy [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد حضرت مقصود را سزاوار که بکلمه مبارکه طیبه طاهره عباد نورانی شفقت
subcodes.subjects: @power of faith; power of the spirit, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
